9:[["$","title",null,{"children":"Glossary"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:title","content":"Glossary"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:description","content":"This article introduces commonly used vocabulary in object storage to help users quickly understand object storage"}],["$","meta",null,{"name":"description","content":"This article introduces commonly used vocabulary in object storage to help users quickly understand object storage"}],[["$","$b","0",{"children":[["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:image","content":"https://docs.rustfs.com/concepts/glossary.webp"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:image:width","content":"1200"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"og:image:height","content":"630"}],["$","meta",null,{"property":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}]]}]]]
a:["$","$Lc",null,{"toc":[],"children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"children":"Glossary"}],["$","$Le",null,{"className":"mb-0","children":"This article introduces commonly used vocabulary in object storage to help users quickly understand object storage"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-row gap-2 items-center border-b pt-2 pb-6","children":[["$","$Lf",null,{"markdownUrl":"/concepts/glossary.md"}],["$","$L10",null,{"markdownUrl":"/concepts/glossary.md","githubUrl":"https://github.com/rustfs/docs.rustfs.com/blob/main/content/concepts/glossary.md"}]]}],["$","$L11",null,{"children":["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"No."}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Term"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"1"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Object Storage"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"An architecture where data is stored as objects, replacing traditional file hierarchy structures"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Bucket"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"A container for storing objects with globally unique namespace"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"3"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Object"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Basic storage unit containing data, metadata, and unique identifier (Object Key)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"4"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Key-value pair information describing object attributes (such as file type, creation time)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"5"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"S3-Compatible"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Storage services compatible with Amazon S3 API standards"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"6"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Data Durability"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"The probability that data remains intact and accessible over a period of time (e.g., 99.999999999%)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"7"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Replication"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Redundancy technology that ensures data safety through multiple copies"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"8"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Erasure Coding"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"A method of data protection in which data is broken into fragments, expanded and encoded with redundant data pieces"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"9"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Cold Storage"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low-cost storage type for infrequently accessed data (such as archived data)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"10"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Lifecycle Management"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Policies for automatically transitioning/deleting objects (e.g., move to cold storage after 30 days)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"11"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Versioning"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Retaining historical versions of objects to prevent overwriting"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"12"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Storage Class"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Different performance/cost storage tiers (Standard, Infrequent Access, Archive)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"13"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Access Key"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Authentication keys for API requests (Access Key ID + Secret Access Key)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"14"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Region"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Geographic location of storage infrastructure (e.g., East China 1, US West)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"15"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Availability Zone (AZ)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Isolated data centers with independent power/network within the same region"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"16"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Endpoint"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Domain address for accessing storage service (e.g., us-east1.rustfs.com)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"17"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"RESTful API"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API design specification based on HTTP protocol"}]]}],"$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f","$L20","$L21","$L22","$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41","$L42","$L43","$L44","$L45","$L46","$L47","$L48","$L49","$L4a","$L4b","$L4c","$L4d","$L4e","$L4f","$L50","$L51","$L52","$L53","$L54","$L55","$L56","$L57","$L58","$L59","$L5a","$L5b","$L5c","$L5d","$L5e","$L5f","$L60","$L61","$L62","$L63","$L64"]}]]}]}]}],"$undefined"]}]
12:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"18"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Multipart Upload"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Mechanism for splitting large files for upload and merging"}]]}]
13:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"19"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Pre-Signed URL"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporary access links with time validity"}]]}]
14:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"20"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Server-Side Encryption (SSE)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Automatic data encryption on server side (SSE-S3/SSE-KMS/SSE-C)"}]]}]
15:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"21"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Client-Side Encryption (CSE)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Local encryption on client side before upload"}]]}]
16:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"22"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Cross-Region Replication"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Automatic object replication across geographic regions"}]]}]
17:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"23"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Access Control List (ACL)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Rule list controlling access permissions for buckets/objects"}]]}]
18:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"24"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Bucket Policy"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"JSON-based fine-grained permission control policies"}]]}]
19:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"25"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"IAM"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Identity and Access Management system for centralized user/role permission management"}]]}]
1a:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"26"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Event Notification"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Sending notifications to message queues/function computing when events trigger"}]]}]
1b:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"27"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Data Lake"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Repository for centralized storage of structured/unstructured data"}]]}]
1c:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"28"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compliance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Meeting data storage regulatory requirements like GDPR, HIPAA"}]]}]
1d:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"29"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Logging & Audit"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recording all API operation logs for auditing"}]]}]
1e:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"30"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Monitoring & Alerting"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Real-time monitoring of storage usage/requests with alerting"}]]}]
1f:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"31"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"CORS"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Rules controlling browser cross-origin resource access"}]]}]
20:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"32"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Transfer Acceleration"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Optimizing upload/download speed through edge nodes"}]]}]
21:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"33"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"CDN Integration"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Combining with Content Delivery Network for caching acceleration"}]]}]
22:["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"34"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Data Export"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Process of migrating data to other storage systems"}]]}]
